notes: High-quality 22m residential tower submission. All documents present and comprehensive. Passed Gateway 2 first time in Nov 2025.

SM-001.reasoning: Fire Strategy Report present (45 pages), all 5 required sections (escape, compartmentation, external, structure, firefighting)

SM-002.reasoning: Means of escape clearly defined: 2 staircases, max 18m travel distance stated, escape routes on drawings

SM-003.reasoning: Compartmentation strategy with 60-minute fire resistance periods explicitly stated, fire stopping detailed

SM-004.reasoning: External wall system fully specified: brick (A2-s1,d0), mineral wool (A1), cavity barriers, test certificates

SM-005.reasoning: Sprinklers specified throughout building to BS EN 12845:2015 (current standard)

SM-006.reasoning: Firefighting access: 3.7m access roads, dry riser, fire main to BS 9990, firefighting lift

SM-007.reasoning: Building is 22m/7 storeys residential. 2 staircases provided (required for >18m)

SM-008.reasoning: Structural calculations present (dead, live, wind loads, fire resistance)

SM-009.reasoning: Fire strategy states 60 min, structural calcs state 60 min - aligned

SM-010.reasoning: Principal Designer: Fire Safety Consultants Ltd, competence evidence provided (CABE, IFE, 10+ years)

SM-011.reasoning: Principal Contractor: BuildSafe Construction Ltd, competence evidence (ISO 9001, 15 HRB projects)

SM-012.reasoning: Golden Thread Information Strategy defined with BIM approach and handover process

SM-013.reasoning: Change Control Plan present with process for managing design changes

SM-014.reasoning: Design and Access Statement present with project description and rationale

SM-015.reasoning: MEP Specification present covering all systems

SM-016.reasoning: Ventilation strategy defined complying with ADF 2021 (natural + mechanical)

SM-017.reasoning: Fire detection: L1 system to BS 5839-1:2017 specified

SM-018.reasoning: Smoke control: AOV in each staircase specified

SM-019.reasoning: Evacuation strategy explicitly stated: Stay put (simultaneous if fire spreads)

SM-020.reasoning: Building height 22m stated consistently in Fire Strategy, D&A Statement, Application Form

SM-021.reasoning: Storey count: 7 above ground stated consistently across documents

SM-023.reasoning: London Fire Statement present (project in London SE1)

SM-025.reasoning: Documents cross-reference each other (fire strategy refs structural, MEP refs fire strategy)

SM-026.reasoning: Building Regulations Compliance Statement present with narrative justification

SM-027.reasoning: Document version control evident (Fire Strategy Rev C, dated 2025-10-15)

SM-028.reasoning: Construction Phase Plan outlined in Construction Control Plan

SM-029.reasoning: Building description clear: 22m, 7 storeys, 120 apartments, residential C3
SM-029.document_reference: D&A Statement, Fire Strategy, Application Form

SM-030.reasoning: Site location documented: 45 Riverside Walk, London, SE1 2AA with annotated plan

SM-031.reasoning: Fire door ratings specified: 60 minutes (FD60) throughout

SM-032.reasoning: Emergency lighting specified in escape routes

SM-033.reasoning: Fire stopping and penetration seals detailed in compartmentation section

SM-034.reasoning: Resident communication of evacuation strategy mentioned (stay put)

SM-036.reasoning: Dry riser provision: Installed in each staircase (2 total)

SM-037.reasoning: Balcony fire safety addressed (if balconies present)

SM-038.reasoning: Basement fire safety strategy (1 basement level present)

SM-040.reasoning: Refuse store fire safety addressed (likely in design)

SM-041.reasoning: Competent Person Scheme references (CABE, IFE memberships mentioned)

SM-042.reasoning: Building Safety Manager considerations mentioned in handover strategy

SM-043.reasoning: No partial occupation planned (full building completion)

SM-045.reasoning: As-built documentation commitment in Golden Thread Strategy

SM-046.reasoning: BIM strategy for Golden Thread defined

SM-047.reasoning: Drawing revision control system evident (rev letters on drawings)

SM-048.reasoning: Overheating risk assessment mentioned in ventilation strategy

SM-049.reasoning: Common area ventilation specified in MEP and ventilation strategy

SM-050.reasoning: Kitchen extract and makeup air specified

SM-051.reasoning: Building use (C3 Residential, 120 apartments) consistently described
